title: erigeron purpurascens
intro: Erigeron purpurascens, also known as the purple fleabane, is a perennial flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Erigeron purpurascens include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical creams and salves, as well as internal remedies.
